title: 実直！　実験！　実証！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Calling out to me like this... Are you finally
confessing? The culprit in the explosion the other
day was actually you, wasn't it, Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No such thing. I just have a favor to ask you
today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As class representative and a model student,
you're the only one I can ask!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! Is that so? Ehehe! In that case, go ahead
and ask away!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I'm glad you're honest and dependable!
Okay, take a look at that clock over there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It emits unique radio waves that are similar yet
different to regular ones, and it uses the brain as
a type of receiver. This affects the pineal gland,
producing melatonin...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Err?! Unique... radio... mela?! What?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In other words! You're being bombarded by
intense drowsiness. But I want you to harness it
for your growth!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Growth? I see! In that case, it's time for the class
representative to shine! I'll show this drowsiness
who's bo...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hypnosis successful. Now for the next phase...
Look around, you're doing a light jog along the
beach at night, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Yes! My legs are so light! It almost feels like
I'm running on air!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Then start doing that, run into the sky...
Surpass your limits! Soar across the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll... surpass my limits!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: OHHH?! I did it! I'm blasting through the sky!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wh-what on earth am I doing? Where did
the beach go?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay! It's time for the big reveal! ...Class
Rep, the culprit who blew up the classroom the
other day was none other than... me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What did you say?! Not once, but twice? The classroom is sacred, and you'd dare blow it up?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've caught you now, Tachyon! I'll get you with
ease!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As I thought, there's a noticeable change in your
gait! My pretend getaway provided us with all the
evidence we need!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My performance-enhancing-hypnosis hypothesis
was correct!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O's running somehow got better!
